case_brief.problem_summary:
1. 某质点沿直线运动,位移 $ S $(单位:m)与时间 $ t $(单位:s)之间的关系为 $ S(t) = 2t^3 - 5t^2 $,则当 $ t = 3 \, \text{s} $ 时该质点的瞬时速度为

A. 21 m/s 
B. 24 m/s 
C. 27 m/s 
D. 30 m/s

case_brief.variant_request: Generate three follow-up variants for this question: one isomorphic, one easier, and one harder. Prioritize the historical weakness memory snapshot and the current solve/verify evidence.
case_brief.target_skill: this question: one isomorphic, one easier, and one harder

variants.problem_text:
某质点沿直线运动,位移 $ S $(单位:m)与时间 $ t $(单位:s)之间的关系为 $ S(t) = 3t^3 - 4t^2 $,则当 $ t = 2 \, \text{s} $ 时该质点的瞬时速度为

A. 12 m/s 
B. 16 m/s 
C. 20 m/s 
D. 24 m/s
changes: Coefficient of $ t^3 $ changed from 2 to 3
Coefficient of $ t^2 $ changed from 5 to 4
variants.intent: Reinforces derivative calculation with adjusted polynomial coefficients and time point while maintaining identical problem structure.
variants.coach_note: Ensure students recognize the derivative process remains unchanged despite coefficient variations.

variants.problem_text:
某质点沿直线运动,位移 $ S $(单位:m)与时间 $ t $(单位:s)之间的关系为 $ S(t) = 3t^2 - 2t $,则当 $ t = 1 \, \text{s} $ 时该质点的瞬时速度为

A. 2 m/s 
B. 3 m/s 
C. 4 m/s 
D. 5 m/s
changes: Reduced displacement function to quadratic polynomial
Time value set to 1s for straightforward calculation
variants.intent: Focuses on foundational derivative concept with linear velocity function to build confidence.
variants.coach_note: Emphasizes basic power rule application without higher-degree terms.

changes: Used a non-monic quadratic and added a verification step.
variants.coach_note: this question: one isomorphic, one easier, and one harder
answer_outline: Identify the factor or equation form.

design_notes: Isomorphic variant maintains identical problem structure to reinforce procedural fluency
Easier variant reduces cognitive load by simplifying function degree
Harder variant introduces chain rule to extend conceptual understanding
